# mtt check: read-only ref integrity sweep; exit 7 on dangling, 0 on clean/unverified
mkdir proj
cd proj
exec mtt init
stdout 'initialized'
exec mtt add 'A'
stdout 'created t1'

# clean repo -> exit 0
exec mtt check
stdout '0 dangling'

# a well-formed url is unverified, NOT a failure -> still exit 0
exec mtt ref add t1 url:https://example.com/x
exec mtt check
stdout '1 unverified'
stdout '0 dangling'

# a dangling task ref -> non-zero (exit 7), the dangling line is printed
exec mtt ref add t1 task:t999
! exec mtt check
stdout 'task:t1.*task:t999.*dangling'
stdout '1 dangling'

# --json emits a non-null array with a status per finding (still dangling -> exit 7)
! exec mtt check --json
stdout '"status": "dangling"'
